questions.question: What is the name of the parent organization of Cell Halcón?
questions.explanation: The parent organization of Cell Halcón is the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative (PAMC), as stated in Section 6.1 of the provided text.

questions.question: What is the role of Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez in Cell Halcón?
questions.explanation: According to Section 6.2, Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez is the Technical Specialist in Cell Halcón.

questions.question: What is the name of the asset's primary operational base?
questions.explanation: The asset's primary operational base is Cuartel Valparaíso, as stated in Section 8.1 of the provided text.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the micro-cache network maintained by the asset?
options: To supply the asset with equipment and resources during operations
To facilitate coordination with other PAMC cells
questions.explanation: The micro-cache network is used to supply the asset with equipment and resources during operations, as described in Section 8.4 of the provided text.

questions.question: What is the name of the doctrine developed by the asset and Dr. Léon Marrón-Saavedra?
questions.explanation: The Doctrine of Sequential Suspension is mentioned in Section 6.8 and 9.4 of the provided text as a doctrine developed by the asset and Dr. Léon Marrón-Saavedra.
